attr.title: The Swapper
attr.desc: A puzzle-platformer set aboard an abandoned space station, built around creating and swapping between clones.
attr.inst: Requires the Windows Steam version of The Swapper. Copy the game files into ports/theswapper/gamedata, then launch the port.
attr.inst_md:
### Steam Instructions
Copy the Windows Steam game files into `ports/theswapper/gamedata`, then launch the port.

The folder should contain `TheSwapper.exe`, `mainSettings.ini`, and the `data` directory.
